candidates.why: Component of revenue but not the total; preferable to use the explicit total revenue line instead.
Component of revenue but not the total; preferable to use the explicit total revenue line instead.
Component of revenue but not the total; preferable to use the explicit total revenue line instead.
Component of revenue but not the total; preferable to use the explicit total revenue line instead.
Explicit total revenue line aggregating all revenue components; best match for top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line; component revenue lines are not used to avoid understating revenue.

candidates.why: Label explicitly mentions COGS but appears unpopulated in preview; however, a populated and more specific 'Cost of Sales' line is available and preferred as the primary COGS measure.
Standard label for cost of goods sold / cost of sales and is populated; best primary COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Printing, purchasing raw materials and other
candidates.why: Component of cost of sales but not the full COGS; prefer the aggregated 'Cost of Sales' line.
Residual component of cost of sales; not the main COGS measure and likely part of the 'Cost of Sales' total.

variables.notes: Used the main aggregated 'Cost of Sales' line as COGS; more appropriate than components or residuals.

candidates.why: Personnel expenses are a classic SG&A overhead component (excluding COGS and D&A).
Represents other operating overhead costs, which fall under SG&A; excludes COGS and explicit D&A/impairments.

variables.notes: Selected primary operating overhead components (personnel and other operating expenses); excluded totals and D&A/impairment lines.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense; does not represent R&D operating expense itself.

variables.notes: No explicit research and development expense line is present; the only related line is amortization of capitalized R&D (a non-operating supplemental detail), which is not current-period R&D expense. XRD is therefore treated as missing (0).

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best representation of recurring interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; a form of interest expense and good fallback if main interest line is missing.
Generic interest expense label; appears unpopulated in preview but is conceptually correct as a fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful as a lower-priority fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list for interest expense: main net interest expense first, then lease-related interest, then generic/supplemental interest lines as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Generic equity label but appears unpopulated; a more specific total shareholders' equity line is available and preferred.
Component of equity rather than total; not appropriate alone for total book equity.
Appears to be an equity subtotal/other bucket; not the main total equity.
Explicit total shareholders' equity, representing equity attributable to owners/parent and excluding minority interest; best choice for BE.
Combined equity including minority interests; not suitable for BE because BE should exclude minority interest to avoid double counting with MIB.

variables.notes: Used the explicit total shareholders' equity, which represents owners’ equity excluding minority interests; this aligns with BE definition.

candidates.why: Represents minority interest share of income (flow), not the balance sheet carrying value; not used for MIB which needs the stock amount.
Duplicate income-statement minority interest line (flow); not the balance sheet stock value required for MIB.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; best match for MIB as the stock of minority equity.
Represents options related to minority interests, not the main minority interest balance; secondary at best.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minority interest (flow), not the stock balance; not used for MIB.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet minority interest line as the non-controlling interest stock value for MIB; income statement and option-related lines are flows or derivatives, not the equity balance.
